letter_text:
Social Security Administration
Notice of Award
Claimant: ELENA SOKOLOVA

We are writing to tell you that you are entitled to monthly retirement benefits. Your first payment will be for February 2026 and will be deposited to your bank account on file.

Monthly benefit amount: $1,540.00

If any of the information we used is wrong, or if your situation changes (for example, you move or change banks), you must tell us. You have the right to appeal if you disagree with any part of this decision; if you want to appeal, you must do so in writing within 60 days of the date you receive this notice.
